description: Style Note In a myriad of colours, prints and patterns, soft cotton T-shirts from french connection look as good as they feel. Up your glam quotient by wearing this graphic tee with a blazer for urban style. Product Details Grey t-shirt has a round neck, short sleeves, brand printed on the front and a brand tag appliqued above the right hem Material and Care 100% cotton Wash with similar colours Iron on reverse side Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
